changes: Added the ability for the host to stop or pause the current game if it is in progress.
When a host trys to quit the race preparation, the game will no longer be stuck. The game will be canceled for all participents and the room will return to it's normal state.
The horn can now be used even if the vehicle is stopped.
serverChanges: Updated the server to accept new events when a player cancels or stops a game that is in progress.
